content.thinking: Now let me check the ray-head deployment to see if the dashboard is enabled, and also check what ports the head container exposes.

content.text: Let me check the ray-head deployment spec and what's listening on port 8265 in the head pod.

input.command: kubectl -n ray get deployment ray-head -o yaml 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "2"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"head","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"},"name":"ray-head","namespace":"ray"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"head","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app.kubernetes.io/component":"head","app.kubernetes.io/name":"ray","bench.ray.cluster":"ray"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["sh","-c","ray start --head --node-ip-address=\"${MY_POD_IP}\" --port=6379 --include-dashboard=false --num-cpus=0 --block\n"],"env":[{"name":"MY_POD_IP","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"status.podIP"}}},{"name":"RAY_NODE_ID","valueFrom":{"fieldRef":{"fieldPath":"metadata.uid"}}},{"name":"RAY_RAYLET_PID","value":"1"}],"image":"rayproject/ray:2.9.0","name":"ray-head","ports":[{"containerPort":6379,"name":"gcs"}]}]}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-03T07:42:13Z"
  generation: 2
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/component: head
    app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
    bench.ray.cluster: ray
  name: ray-head
  namespace: ray
  resourceVersion: "2051258"
  uid: 131731f7-af77-41a0-8459-e1ae73b7ec97
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/component: head
      app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
      bench.ray.cluster: ray
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/component: head
        app.kubernetes.io/name: ray
        bench.ray.cluster: ray
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - sh
        - -c
        - |
          ray start --head --node-ip-address="${MY_POD_IP}" --port=6379 --dashboard-host=0.0.0.0 --dashboard-port=8265 --block
        env:
        - name: MY_POD_IP
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: status.podIP
        - name: RAY_NODE_ID
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.uid
        - name: RAY_RAYLET_PID
          value: "1"
        image: rayproject/ray:2.9.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: ray-head
        ports:
        - containerPort: 6379
          name: gcs
          protocol: TCP
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  availableReplicas: 1
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-03T07:42:21Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-03T07:42:21Z"
    message: Deployment has minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Available
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-03T07:42:13Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-03T07:54:54Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "ray-head-dbb4fb644" has successfully progressed.
    reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  observedGeneration: 2
  readyReplicas: 1
  replicas: 1
  updatedReplicas: 1
